title: Add CSRF guard for admin mutations
goal: Protect cookie-authenticated admin mutation routes from cross-site request forgery before production launch.
scope: Require an allowed Origin or Referer header for unsafe admin mutation methods.
Apply the guard to admin create/update/delete/moderation routes and logout.
Keep safe admin reads available behind normal session authentication.
Add focused unit coverage for allowed, missing, null, referer, and disallowed origins.
verification: Admin mutation without Origin or Referer returns csrf_required.
Admin mutation from disallowed Origin returns csrf_invalid.
Admin mutation from configured allowed origin passes the CSRF guard.
completed_notes: Added requireAdminCSRF middleware with Origin and Referer validation against API_ALLOWED_ORIGINS.
Applied the middleware to unsafe admin write routes and logout.
